intended_use: CINA CHEST is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of Chest and Thoraco-abdominal CT angiography. The device is intended to assist hospital
intended_use_full: CINA CHEST is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of Chest and Thoraco-abdominal CT angiography. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communicating suspected positive findings of (1) Chest CT angiography for Pulmonary Embolism (PE) and (2) Chest or Thoraco-abdominal CT angiography for Aortic Dissection (AD).
ground_truth: Concurrence of several US board-certified radiologist readers
other_metrics: Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC): PE 0.83, AD 0.94; Time-to-notification for PE: 63 ± 16.1 seconds (median 60.8); Time-to-notification for AD: 36.5 ± 9.1 seconds (median 34.1)
